question: Find all Niphal verbs
mql: SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE [word sp=verb AND vs=nif GET sp, vs, gloss] GO

question: Where does the verb BR> (to create) occur?
mql: SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE [word lex='BR>[' GET lex, gloss] GO

question: Find feminine plural nouns
mql: SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE [word sp=subs AND gn=f AND nu=pl] GO

question: Find all imperative verbs
mql: SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE [word vt=impv] GO

question: Find all proper nouns (names)
mql: SELECT ALL OBJECTS WHERE [word sp=nmpr] GO
